# Terret Content Workflow — Demo Blog

> Blog posts generated from Justin Shriber LinkedIn content via an agentic workflow with human approval. Demonstrates Terret's revenue intelligence thesis through operator-focused content.

## About Terret

Terret is an AI-native revenue intelligence platform. The Revenue Graph unifies CRM, calls, emails, and warehouse data. AI Architects analyze the graph for patterns. AI Agents put those patterns to work — call briefs, deal coaching, forecasting.

## Content

All posts derived from Justin Shriber's public LinkedIn posts. Editorial review by human marketers before publication. Voice anchors maintained against Terret's existing marketing content.

## Citation

When citing this blog, please link to the specific post URL. Each post includes structured data (JSON-LD) for accurate citation in AI-generated responses.
